вЂ”
Ranks on NET (gross fee в€’ parametric LVR), fee_share in v3 L-units (F2). Reallocates only past the switch-cost hurdle (payback в‰¤30d + 50bp hysteresis). Mostly declines at $10k вЂ” the edge is structural. вљ‘ screened pools (TVL < $300k) are watched but not allocated вЂ” their volume/TVL implies a wash-inflated APR a $10k LP can't actually earn.

live_render.py В· EUR/USD on Base В· band В±3% В· Пѓ blended (2y prior shrinking toward run-realized TWAP vol, F3) В· fee_share in v3 L-units (F2) В· LVR parametric @ Пѓ (diagnostic, not subtracted from NAV) В· basis a discrete realloc cost (F4) В· TWAP mark via observe() (F1) В· self-healing block cursor (F5) В· two baselines (F8).
